section.heading: Purposes and coverage

content.p: It is the purpose of this part to improve the efficiency of electric motors and pumps and certain other industrial equipment in order to conserve the energy resources of the Nation.

subsection.heading: Inclusion of industrial equipment as covered equipment

content.p: The Secretary may, by rule, include a type of industrial equipment as covered equipment if he determines that to do so is necessary to carry out the purposes of this part.

subsection.heading: Inclusion of component parts of consumer products as industrial equipment
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary may, by rule, include as industrial equipment articles which are component parts of consumer products, if he determines that—

paragraph.content: such articles are, to a significant extent, distributed in commerce other than as component parts for consumer products; and
such articles meet the requirements of section 6311(2)(A) of this title (other than clauses (ii) and (iii)).

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 94–163, title III, § 341, as added Pub. L. 95–619, title IV, § 441(a), Nov. 9, 1978, 92 Stat. 3268.)
